reference: TALKING OF COUNTRIES REPLIED FRANZ OF WHAT COUNTRY IS THE COUNT WHAT IS HIS NATIVE TONGUE WHENCE DOES HE DERIVE HIS IMMENSE FORTUNE AND WHAT WERE THOSE EVENTS OF HIS EARLY LIFE A LIFE AS MARVELLOUS AS UNKNOWN THAT HAVE TINCTURED HIS SUCCEEDING YEARS WITH SO DARK AND GLOOMY A MISANTHROPY
text: "Talking of countries," replied Franz, "of what countries the Count? What is his native tongue? Whence does he derive his immense fortune? And what were those events of his early life—a life as marvelous as unknown—that have tinted his succeeding years with so dark and gloomy a misanthropy?"
